arts.ttl: Newcastle United transfer deal 'approved' as Jorge Mendes meeting held
arts.sum: Reigning Premier League champions Manchester City are said to have held talks with agent Jorge Mendes regarding a possible move for Abdukodir Khusanov. Saudi Pro League side Al-Shabab have reportedly reached an agreement with Newcastle United to sign 35-year-old goalkeeper Dubravka.

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Arsenal eye Jobe Bellingham amid gentleman’s agreement
arts.sum: Jobe Bellingham has primarily been a ball-winning midfielder for Sunderland this season, having occupied a more box-to-box role last term. Arsenal have set their sights on Sunderland's 19-year-old midfield prodigy Jobe Bellingham as they plan for a midfield overhaul in the coming transfer windows.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Nwaneri 'out for a few weeks' with injury
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta says teenage attacking midfielder Ethan Nwaneri will be "out for a few weeks" with a muscular issue.

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth's last Newcastle United transfer suggestion to leave Man United in January
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth had an eye on Joshua Zirkzee during his ill-fated stint at Newcastle United as sporting director. Chronicle Live understands that Zirkzee was one of the names Ashworth took with him to Manchester United when he swapped St James' Park for Old Trafford earlier this year.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Exclusive: Big Update on Mbeumo and Cunha After Arsenal Links
arts.sum: GIVEMESPORT columnist Fabrizio Romano provides a big update on futures of Bryan Mbeumo and Matheus Cunha after recent transfer links with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals how long Arsenal expect to be without Ethan Nwaneri
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri was taken off against Brighton & Hove Albion having opened the scoring for Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues worrying injury update on Ethan Nwaneri after the teenager forced off against Brighton with a muscular issue
arts.sum: Nwaneri, 17, marked his second successive Premier League start in Arsenal's 1-1 draw at Brighton by opening the scoring in the first period before he was withdrawn at half-time.

arts.ttl: Arsenal XI vs Newcastle: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Gunners increasingly short of options in forward areas

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's added transfer complication despite PSR signing as big exit edges closer
arts.sum: Yet, while John Ruddy and Mark Gillespie are training ground leaders who offer vital experience to Eddie Howe's dressing room and Odysseas Vlachodimos could deputise for Nick Pope upon Dubravka leaving, Newcastle are still seeking out potential shot-stoppers for both the short and long-term. Newcastle United are poised to lose Martin Dubravka to Saudi Arabian side Al-Shabab in the coming days, despite the Slovakian currently flourishing as the club's stand-in No 1 between the sticks.

arts.ttl: Depleted Arsenal suffer another injury blow with Ethan Nwaneri sidelined
arts.sum: Nwaneri grabbed the opener in Arsenal’s 1-1 draw at Brighton on Saturday before going off at half-time with a muscle issue.
